name: procurement managers in mid-sized retail companies using Shopify, processing 10-20 purchase orders/week tool
description: For procurement managers in mid-sized retail companies using Shopify processing 10-20 invoices/week, delayed approvals cause compliance issues. We provide automated tracking and weekly summaries instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement managers in mid-sized retail companies using Shopify, processing 10-20 purchase orders/week
problem_solved: Lack of visibility into purchase order approvals leading to compliance issues.
